Every individual took birth somewhere in this pattern of
divisible time and thus for sure his birth and the life from
there onwards is in some way related to it. This book tries to
present the astrological concepts about the co-relation of
divisible time and birth. The ancient sages give prime
consideration to the co-relation between the rhythm of !hat

Secrets o(Birth Time Rectification
particular day of birth with the birth time. Or in other words
the rhythm of that day itself is the most influencing factor in
determination of birth time. Birth is not an event that happens
in split of a second, but a process that takes some time
duration. But the birth time astrologers consider for drawing
the chart is a time that is exact even to seconds. This poses
the questions - Which is the correct Birth time? What are the
methods to derive the correct birth time?
